Made by Dylan Landman

Discover Random Corners of the Web

Hit the button for a random adventure, or browse all 85 tiny interactive sites below.

Finding something cool
Browse all sites

Filter by Category

Educational

Morse Code Sandbox

Learn and Practice Morse Code!

Educational

CSS Cursor Types

Explore and preview all CSS cursor types

Educational

Binary Ticker

Watch numbers count up in decimal, binary, octal and hexadecimal

Educational

Pi Digit Distribution

Visualize how frequently each digit (0-9) appears in the first million digits of π

Educational

LocalStorage Terminal

A terminal emulator that uses localStorage as a virtual filesystem

Educational

CSS Test

Test and experiment with different CSS styles and effects

Educational

Roman Numeral Converter

Convert numbers to Roman numerals with Victorian elegance

Educational

Project Idea Slot Machine

Spin the wheels of creativity to generate random project ideas

Educational

Coastline

How long is the coast? Depends how hard you look.

Educational

Chaos Game

Place three dots and watch pure randomness draw a perfect fractal

Educational

Fun & Interactive

The Longest Name

Hello, my name is... build the longest, most decorated name in history, one title at a time

Fun & Interactive

You Are Being Watched

A fake surveillance feed of you — with tracking boxes, biometric readouts, and a rising threat level.

Fun & Interactive

Duplicate

Watch text exponentially duplicate from 1 'a' to infinity

Fun & Interactive

Linguistic Anomalies

Sentences that are grammatically correct, but shouldn't be.

Fun & Interactive

Falling Keys

Watch your keystrokes fall and bounce around the screen

Fun & Interactive

Scrollympics

Track how far you've scrolled in real-world distances

Fun & Interactive

Nice Cursor

Experience a supersized cursor that follows your mouse

Fun & Interactive

Infinite Number Casino

Discover rare and special numbers as you scroll infinitely

Fun & Interactive

Welcome Back

See when you last visited and get a greeting

Fun & Interactive

Happy Birthday!

Create personalized birthday celebrations with effects

Fun & Interactive

Psychedelic Waves

Interactive particle system with mesmerizing visual effects

Fun & Interactive

Password Security Checker

Check how secure your password is with sassy feedback

Fun & Interactive

ChatGPT With An Attitude

Chat with a sassy AI assistant

Fun & Interactive

Name a Shape

Draw and save geometric shapes as images

Fun & Interactive

Write Me a Story

Interactive story writing experience

Fun & Interactive

Checkbox Grid

Interactive grid of checkboxes

Fun & Interactive

Eyes on Me

Use your imagination on this one!

Fun & Interactive

Comic Move Attacks

Click anywhere to unleash epic comic book action effects!

Fun & Interactive

Don't Press The Button

A button that should not be pressed under any circumstances

Fun & Interactive

Magic 8 Ball

Ask the mystical 8 ball your questions

Fun & Interactive

Visit Counter

Track how many times you've visited this page

Fun & Interactive

Rube Goldberg Machine

Click START and watch a 10-step chain reaction of satisfying canvas animations

Fun & Interactive

Mirror

Type something and watch it appear in 4 versions: normal, backwards, upside-down, and mirrored — all at once

Fun & Interactive

Typewriter

A full-screen 1940s noir typewriter experience. Every keystroke clicks. Every word feels intentional.

Fun & Interactive

Gravity Search

A perfectly normal search engine. Until you search.

Fun & Interactive

1,000 Balls

Exactly one thousand bouncing balls. Count them if you don't believe us.

Fun & Interactive

Camouflage

A white page with white text. It's in there somewhere.

Fun & Interactive

Wet Paint

The sign says do not touch. Everything you touch smears.

Fun & Interactive

The Quietest Site on the Web

0.000 dB and holding. Please do not adjust your volume.

Fun & Interactive

Infinite Maze

Zoom out. The maze keeps going. Zoom out more.

Fun & Interactive

The Dummy Factory

A bear-headed helicopter in clown shoes. Or reroll for one of 29,000 others.

Fun & Interactive

Tools

5 O'Clock Somewhere

Find out where in the world it's currently 5 PM

Tools

To Do List

A simple to do list

Tools

Character Counter

Count the characters in your text

Tools

Names in a Hat

Randomly select names from a hat

Tools

Time Meters

Progress bars for the day, week, month, year, decade, century, and millennium

Tools

Timezone Ticket

Find the time difference between two locations

Tools

Leap Year Test

Give a year, tell if its a leap year

Tools

ASCII Key Tester

View ASCII codes for keyboard keys

Tools

Drunk Meter

Track your blood alcohol content (BAC) level

Tools

Font Ninja

Preview and copy web-safe font stacks

Tools

Password Generator

Generate secure random passwords

Tools

Random Color

Generate a random color

Tools

Your Birthday, Your Color!

Enter your birthday and get your unique hex color

Tools

What's My Resolution?

Find out your screen resolution and device specs

Tools

About My Device

View all available metadata about your device and browser

Tools

Tailwind CSS Fractal

Interactive color scheme visualization

Tools

Cool (and Uncool) Loaders

A collection of loading animations

Tools

Scoreboard

A tap-to-score scoreboard for any game — track two teams, period, and time

Tools

Paint by Number

Upload a photo and turn it into a paint-by-number template you can fill in

Tools

Games

Fair Die

A fair die with some skewed odds

Games

3D Snake

Play a 3D version of the classic snake game with improved graphics and physics

Games

Sliding Puzzle

Solve a sliding puzzle by rearranging tiles to form a complete image

Games

Daily Doodle

Draw something new every day based on a daily prompt

Games

Spin the Bottle

Virtual bottle spinning game

Games

Largest Number Game

Try to enter the largest number possible

Games

Emoji Prop Hunt

Find the target emoji hidden among decoys

Games

Virtual Piano

Play music on a virtual piano keyboard

Games

Board Game Generator

Generate unique Mario Party-style boards with forks, teleporters, traps, and chaos spaces

Games

Red Light, Green Light

Test your reflexes in this classic children's game

Games

Reaction Time

Click when the screen turns green. How fast are you?

Games

Shape Match

Same shape or mirrored? Decide fast. Gets faster.

Games

Balance the Stick

Keep a stick balanced as long as you can

Games

Pong

Classic Pong

Games

Country Marble Race

Watch marbles race down a track in a tournament

Games

Infinite Tic Tac Toe

Play tic tac toe without boundaries

Games

Colorle

Daily color guessing game

Games

Clap-o-Meter

Click as fast as you can for 10 seconds and get a dramatic carnival rating

Games

Binary Sudoku

Sudoku with only 0s and 1s. The hardest mode is a 2×2 grid. You will win.

Games

Entertainment

Severance Dance

Watch the MDR Department dance to your favorite tunes

Entertainment

Lyrics to Songs Without Lyrics

Look at the lyrics to songs without lyrics

Entertainment

89 Degree Triangle

Look at a triangle with an angle of 89 degrees

Entertainment

Chicanery

I AM NOT CRAZY!

Entertainment

The Magic Number 4

A fun interactive way to learn about the number 4

Entertainment

Christmas Eve Eve Eve...

HOW MANY DAYS UNTIL CHRISTMAS AHHH

Entertainment

What to do

Helps you figure out your priorities for the day...

Entertainment

I'm Sorry :(

A way to "sincerely" apologize to anyone you have wronged

Entertainment

Do You Like Me?

A fun interactive yes/no question with a twist

Entertainment

Meme Soundboard

Play classic meme sound effects and download them

Entertainment

Hatch The Egg

Wait and watch the egg hatch!

Entertainment

WOW

Just watch as you are continuosly wow'd

Entertainment

Interdimensional DVR

Watch interdimensional cable shows from across the multiverse

Entertainment

Doomscroll

An infinite feed of increasingly absurd headlines. You can't stop scrolling.

Entertainment

Static

TV static that slowly resolves into a hidden message. Wait for it.

Entertainment

The Map

A procedurally generated fantasy map. Different every time.

Entertainment

How Long Have You Been Staring?

A timer. That's it. Just a timer counting how long you've been here.

Entertainment

Grow Your Garden

Click to plant seeds that grow in real time. Come back tomorrow and they're taller.

Entertainment

Confession

Type something anonymously. It disappears. No one reads it. Maybe that's the point.

Entertainment

The Last Survivors

Conway's Game of Life with colored tribes. Place cells, place your bet, watch the chaos.

Entertainment

Translate to Legalese

Type anything casual. Get back an incomprehensible legal document.

Entertainment

Brain Rot Engine

Watch a bouncing ball create psychedelic trails

Entertainment

Drips

Watch digital water drip down your screen

Entertainment

Picsum Photo Generator

Browse and copy endless stock photos for your projects

Entertainment

Shakespeare Insult Maker

Generate Shakespearean-style insults

Entertainment

DVD Bounce

Watch the DVD logo bounce around the screen

Entertainment

Why am I Late?

Generate creative excuses for being late

Entertainment

Your Phone Has a Crack in It

Your phone has a crack in it

Entertainment

Unmotivational Quotes

Your daily dose of disappointment

Entertainment

The Last Time

A quiet scroll through the moments that passed without a goodbye

Entertainment

Oddly Specific Horoscopes

The stars have reviewed your file. Today's reading is uncomfortably precise.

Entertainment

Mindfulness

Wreck Room

Smash blocks and relieve stress in this destructive game

Mindfulness

Breathe

Guided breathing meditation with calming animations

Mindfulness

Daily Affirmations

Start your day with peaceful, positive affirmations

Mindfulness

Slow TV

Procedurally generated ambient scenes — fireplace, rain window, night train, snowy field. Pure code, pure vibes.

Mindfulness

Noise Machine

Mix white, brown, and pink noise with rain, thunder, café chatter, and fan hum — all generated live in your browser.

Mindfulness

Art

Chess Art Generator

Watch chess pieces create beautiful colored patterns on an infinite board

Art

Parallel Lines

Two parallel lines that move infinitely but never meet

Art

Life Of Color Theory

Every day, a new color from the RGB spectrum is displayed in a 45,964-year journey

Art

Library of Everything

View the vast endlessness of numbers

Art

Museum of Bad Art

Procedurally generated terrible abstract paintings paired with pompous gallery descriptions. Infinite collection.

Art

Voice Paint

Your voice is the brush — hum, sing, or yell and watch it paint

Art

Ink Drop

Click to drop ink into water and watch it bloom, curl, and mix

Art

Rothko Machine

An endless stream of generated color field paintings, each with a deadpan title

Art

Murmuration

A few thousand starlings at dusk. Your cursor is the hawk.

Art

Kaleidoscope

Paint with radial symmetry — every stroke blooms into a mandala

Art

Tessellation

Draw anywhere and your strokes tile into an endless repeating pattern

Art

Weaver

Drag to lay threads on a loom — warp and weft interlace into real cloth

Art

Fireflies

A meadow of fireflies slowly finds one shared rhythm. Click to scatter it.

Art

The Infinite Painting

Zoom into the brushstrokes. There is no bottom.

Art
And more to come...
